title: Unify status badges and action hierarchy
acceptance_criteria: All major screens use one badge dictionary; destructive actions visually separated and no duplicate primary CTA per section.

title: Inline validation standard + blocking summary
acceptance_criteria: Field validation appears on blur; blocking summary appears only on submit; applies to Students/Teachers/Enrollment forms.

title: Reason code capture for governed decisions
acceptance_criteria: Approve/Return/Reject/Waitlist/Cancel cannot commit without required reason code where matrix requires.

title: Persistent search/filter/sort presets
acceptance_criteria: Students/Teachers/Enrollment/Reports remember last filter and sort within session.

title: Operational warning cards (requirements, waitlist, failures)
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows pending requirements, waitlist pressure, and latest backup/restore failure state.

title: Audit payload completeness validator
acceptance_criteria: Governed actions log actor/action/entity/result/reason where required; missing fields rejected or flagged.

title: Preflight gate for restore and rollover execute buttons
acceptance_criteria: Execute disabled until preflight pass + required acknowledgment/typed confirm for Tier3.

title: Convert module interactions to consistent list-detail workspace
acceptance_criteria: Students/Teachers/Enrollment/Operations use consistent list-detail interaction; reduced modal stacking.

title: Enrollment review workbench (queue + detail + decision panel)
acceptance_criteria: Decision actions occur in single workbench; next-item action available; stale-data conflict shown inline.

title: Unified requirement checklist component
acceptance_criteria: Checklist statuses consistent (Missing/Submitted/Verified/Rejected/Expired) and shown in Student + Enrollment contexts.

title: Dependency impact preview before archive/restore
acceptance_criteria: Archive/restore confirmation shows dependent records count and blocking reasons before commit.

title: Saved presets + run history integration
acceptance_criteria: Users can save filter presets and view run/export history for report executions.

title: Queue aging indicators and SLA visuals
acceptance_criteria: Enrollment queue rows display age; configurable warning thresholds shown with visual severity.

title: Restore conflict and post-restore forced session refresh
acceptance_criteria: Restore path blocks on preflight incompatibility and forces re-login/cache refresh after successful restore.

title: Implement explicit enrollment state machine service
acceptance_criteria: All enrollment transitions are policy-driven; forbidden transitions blocked; transition history immutable.

title: Permission boundary layer for future role expansion
acceptance_criteria: Action policy keys exist for all governed operations; current SUPERADMIN pass-through maintained.

title: Shared preflight framework (restore + rollover + future critical ops)
acceptance_criteria: Preflight pipeline reusable with pass/fail/check details and integration hooks for UI gating.

title: Operational metrics dashboard service
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard supports trend metrics: queue aging, decision reversals, waitlist pressure, failed critical ops.

title: Exception queue architecture for edge cases
acceptance_criteria: Concurrency conflicts/dependency blocks/preflight failures route into managed exception queue with assignment status.

title: Correlation/request-id propagation for governed actions
acceptance_criteria: All governed actions persist correlation ID for traceability across audit and operation logs.
